scripts.release: nx release && pnpm run publish:dotnet && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:first: nx release --first-release && pnpm run publish:dotnet && git push --follow-tags
scripts.publish:dotnet: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./apps/cli-npx/package.json').version") && dotnet pack apps/cli-dotnet/AiSkills.slnx -c Release -p:Version="$VERSION" -o apps/cli-dotnet/dist && dotnet nuget push "apps/cli-dotnet/dist/*.nupkg" -s https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json -k "$NUGET_API_KEY" --skip-duplicate
